_note: PR #17 — anonymized real-WiseReport-shaped layout fixtures. Each text file under texts/ mimics the 표3. 실적 전망 / 수정 후 / 수정 전 / 변동률 layout that pdfplumber emits from real WiseReport PDFs. shas are deterministic placeholders, never real PDF hashes. Filenames do NOT include a [...] ticker block — the new layout parser does not depend on it for metric extraction; bridge_meta.real_layout.synthetic.json supplies KRX tickers for the chain test.
